{{Infobox group
| name = Ghost-Blade
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ghost-Blade]] is a warband of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ghost-Blades]] practice a [[Path]] of [[sword]] and death [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ghost-Blade]] is one of the eight wandering mercenary armies in the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Ghost-Blade]]'s [[Goldsign]] is a hovering spirit of death [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
